40th Holiday but Dave's 39th

Marbella

Four days on the Costa del Sol — a villa pool party, old town Italian, and a beach club night to send Dave off into his forties in style.

Tue 11 — Fri 14 August 2026 Shannon SNN → Málaga AGP 17 travellers

The Plan

Every day has free time built in — nothing here is compulsory, but let us know if you're not attending the dinners out, as deposits are paid on a per-head basis.

01 Tuesday, August 11 — Touchdown Travel day
11:50

Marbella Old Town, Orange Square (Plaza de los Naranjos).

Wed 12 Aug · 18:00

Luxury BBQ

At the villa · waiting staff included · view on Google Maps →
  • To start — freshly made mojitos, selection of luxury canapés, rosemary focaccia bread & alioli
  • Off the grill — rib of Galician beef with chimichurri, marinated lamb leg with rosemary, king prawns in garlic butter, chicken with lemon parsley & garlic, fresh premium artisan sausages
  • Sides — roasted potatoes with truffle & parmesan, fresh asparagus & padrón pepper, tomato & garlic salad, fresh bread & alioli
  • To finish — selection of mini desserts
Thu 13 Aug · 11:00

Champagne Breakfast

At the villa · waiting staff included · view on Google Maps →
  • Unlimited mimosa cocktails
  • Danish bacon, English butcher's sausages, fresh eggs, mushrooms, baked beans, smoked salmon
  • Three egg omelette with fillings
  • Croissants & muffins, fresh fruit platter, muesli & yogurt
  • Toasted bread & selection of jams, tea & coffee, orange juice
Thu 13 Aug · 19:00

Live Weather — Marbella

Pulled live from Open-Meteo, updates each time you open this tab — current conditions plus a day-by-day forecast for the trip.

Loading current conditions…

☀️ Typical August days

Highs of 29–31°C, lows around 20–22°C overnight — hot and dry with next to no rain expected.

🌊 Sea temperature

The Mediterranean off Marbella typically sits around 23–25°C in August — comfortable for a swim any time of day.

🔆 UV & sun

UV index runs very high through the day (peaking around midday–3pm). Factor 30+ sun cream, a hat, and shade breaks are worth building into pool days.

🌅 Daylight

Around 14 hours of daylight in mid-August — sunrise near 7:20am, sunset around 9:00pm, so plenty of evening light for dinners and drinks outdoors.

Villa & Key Spots

Tap through to Google Maps for directions and live traffic.

🏡 Villa Issabella

10-12 Paseo del Perú, Elviria, Marbella 29604, Spain

Versace-themed luxury villa, 8 bedrooms / 8 bathrooms, sleeping up to 17 — private pool with day beds, jacuzzi, pool table, gym, and landscaped gardens. Home base for the four days, around 10–15 mins from Puerto Banús and 30 mins from Málaga airport.

📍 Open in Google Maps 🔗 Website

🏖️ The Beach House

Avenida de las Antillas, s/n, Urb. Coto de los Dolores, 29604 Elviria, Marbella

Beachfront restaurant & club in Elviria. It's about 2km from the villa — worth a taxi rather than the walk, especially in the August heat. Thursday's dinner venue, with live music from 20:00.

📍 Open in Google Maps 🔗 Website

🍽️ Aldente Gold

Marbella Old Town, Orange Square — Tuesday dinner
📍 Open in Google Maps 📋 Menu

Local Area

Everything below is within about a 20-minute walk of Villa Issabella in Elviria, unless a taxi is noted.

☕ El Patio Bistro

Breakfast option, ~10 min taxi from the villa.

☕ Aura Café

Breakfast option, ~10 min taxi from the villa.

🏖️ The Beach House

Beachfront breakfast, lunch, and the Thursday group dinner venue. It's about 2km from the villa — a taxi is the better call, especially in the afternoon heat. Menu →

🍸 Nikki Beach Marbella

The well-known beach club is walkable from the villa — good for a daybed, cocktails, and people-watching if there's a free afternoon going spare.

🍹 Marbella Old Town

Orange Square (Plaza de los Naranjos) and the streets around it are the spot for bars post-dinner on Tuesday — about 15–20 min by taxi from Elviria.

🛒 Supersol & Bar Casi Casi

A commercial complex just west of the Elviria roundabout, within about a 20-minute walk — Supersol supermarket plus Bar Casi Casi for snacks, sandwiches, and a decent wine list.

🛒 Opencor & Nu Fluid Lounge

Another walkable cluster on the Fuengirola side of Elviria — Opencor supermarket, with Nu Fluid Lounge just 100m past it for cocktails on a sunny terrace, plus Thai, Indian and Spanish spots nearby.

🛍️ Centro Comercial Elviria

Small local mall with a Carrefour supermarket, banks, a chemist, and a good spread of tapas bars and cafés — also within easy walking range.

🛍️ La Cañada Shopping Centre

Marbella's main shopping mall, roughly 10 minutes by car — cinema, shops, and a food court if anyone needs a break from the sun.

🛴 E-scooter hire

Scoot Marbella offers electric scooter rental with delivery straight to the villa — handy for nipping to the beach or the shops without waiting on a taxi.

🌴 Aventura Amazonia

Treetop adventure park within walking distance of the villa — zip lines and obstacle courses if anyone wants to burn off energy (or a hangover).

🚕 Getting around

Taxis are the easiest option for a group heading further afield — download the "Free Now" app, widely used across the Costa del Sol.

Useful Info

The bits worth knowing before you land.

🕒 Time zone

Spain is 1 hour ahead of Ireland in August (CEST vs IST) — check your watch off the plane.

🔌 Power

Spain uses 2-pin Type C/F sockets, different to Ireland's 3-pin — bring an adapter.

💶 Currency

Euro — same as home, no currency exchange needed. Cards widely accepted, but handy to carry some cash for taxis and small bars.

🚨 Emergency number

112 works across the EU for police, ambulance, or fire.

🏥 Nearest hospital

Hospital Costa del Sol is the main hospital serving the Marbella area — worth saving the location before you travel.

☀️ Pack for it

August in Marbella runs hot and dry — sun cream, swimwear, something light for old town cobbles, and a layer for evening breeze.

💬 Tipping

Not obligatory in Spain — rounding up or leaving 5–10% for good service is normal, not expected.

👥 Group size

17 travelling — the Thursday Beach House dinner is already booked for the full group.

🛒 Villa supplies

Food and drink essentials will be delivered to the villa ahead of arrival.

🛒 Supermarkets nearby

Supersol and Opencor are both within about a 20-minute walk, with Carrefour at Centro Comercial Elviria too — see the Local Area tab for the full list.

☕🍸 Cafés & bars nearby

Bar Casi Casi and Nu Fluid Lounge are both walkable from the villa, alongside a good spread of tapas bars and cafés at Centro Comercial Elviria — details on the Local Area tab.
